description: JSON template for tracking test artifacts per run. Every documented test result MUST reference a completed manifest.

artifacts.description: Full-page screenshot after step 3 — showing dashboard with issue list loaded
Screen recording of the full headed test run — duration 12.4s
Playwright trace including network, console, DOM snapshots
Browser console log output during test execution
Server stdout/stderr captured during test execution
Vitest JSON test report — full suite results
Playwright HTML report — trace viewer, screenshots, video

notes: Each artifact entry must have a unique path per runId.
SHA256 is computed client-side before upload. Use: certutil -hashfile <path> SHA256 (Windows) or sha256sum <path> (Unix).
Artifact paths are relative to the Positron workspace root unless absolute paths are explicitly required.
The manifest itself MUST be stored alongside the artifacts it describes (e.g., artifacts/manifests/<runId>-manifest.json).
